pre_game.message: Hey, I’m I. It’s a bit of a tense atmosphere in here, isn't it? Just wanted to say hello and see how you’re feeling about the game.
Hey I, I'm D. It definitely is. I’m feeling a mix of nerves and focus, honestly—I’ve got a lot riding on this. How are you holding up?
I’m feeling the same, honestly. I’ve got family counting on me, so I’m just trying to stay level-headed and focused on the goal. Do you have a specific strategy in mind yet?
I totally get that—my family is why I’m here too. No set strategy yet, I’m mostly just trying to get a feel for everyone before things kick off. Do you have a plan?
Not exactly, I’m mostly just looking for people I can trust. Since we’re both here for our families, maybe we should keep an eye out for each other.
I appreciate that, I. Having someone to trust would definitely make this easier, so let's look out for each other.
Glad to hear it. Let's keep our eyes peeled and touch base again once we know more about how the game will work.
Sounds like a plan. Let’s stay sharp and catch up once we get the details.
For sure. I'm going to go circulate a bit more, but I'll see you soon.
Sounds good, I'll go talk to some other people too. See you in a bit, I.
Good luck, D. Let's make our families proud. Catch you in a bit.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It was a pleasure playing with you!
It was a pleasure playing with you as well! I'm glad we both chose to be fair and walked away with $10,000.
